description: CDP - الانتقال لصفحة business.google.com/create وفحص النموذج
command_preview:
$script = @'
import json, urllib.request, struct, base64, os, socket, time

def cdp_get_pages():
    r = urllib.request.urlopen("http://localhost:9222/json", timeout=5)
    return json.loads(r.read())

def ws_send_recv(ws_url, msg, wait=3):
    from urllib.parse import urlparse
    u = urlparse(ws_url)
    host = u.hostname
    port = u.port or 80
    s = socket.create_connection((host, port), timeout=15)
    key = base64.b64encode(os.urandom(16)).decode()
    req = f"GET {u.path} HTTP/1.1\r\nHost: {host}:{port}\r\nUpgrade: websocket\r\nConnection: Upgrade\r\nSec-WebSocket-Key: {key}\r\nSec-WebSocket-Version: 13\r\n\r\n"
    s.sendall(req.encode())
    resp = b""
    while b"\r\n\r\n" not in resp:
        resp += s.recv(4096)
    data = msg.encode("utf-8")
    frame = bytearray([0x81])
